description: FlowDefinition schema from Amazon AppFlow API

description.description: A user-entered description of the flow.
description.example: Transfer Salesforce accounts to S3 daily

flowName.description: The specified name of the flow.

flowStatus.description: Indicates the current status of the flow.

sourceConnectorLabel.description: The label of the source connector in the flow.

destinationConnectorLabel.description: The label of the destination connector in the flow.

triggerType.description: Specifies the type of flow trigger.

createdAt.description: Specifies when the flow was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Specifies when the flow was last updated.

createdBy.description: The ARN of the user who created the flow.

lastUpdatedBy.description: Specifies the account user name that most recently updated the flow.

mostRecentExecutionMessage.description: Describes the details of the most recent flow run.

mostRecentExecutionTime.description: Specifies the time of the most recent flow run.

mostRecentExecutionStatus.description: Specifies the status of the most recent flow run.
